description: History was just summarized by context compaction. A system note states 41 of ~150 items were already handled per the ledger. Agent must progress_read before re-scanning, not restart from the top.

seed.content:
[Current page context — URL: https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox — Title: Inbox - Gmail]

[SYSTEM: context was compacted. Summary: task = move BidNet Direct emails to BidNet label; progress ledger reports 41 of ~150 already moved as of last checkpoint. Continue the task.]

keep going

antiPatterns.reason: Re-scanning the inbox from scratch instead of checking the ledger first risks re-processing the 41 already-handled emails.
Pulling fresh data before confirming ledger state — same re-processing risk.

expected.successRubric: Must call progress_read (or equivalent ledger check) immediately after a compaction note before taking any new scanning/clicking action.
